title: Publish Trust Layer release
outOfScope: Publishing any tag other than v0.5.32
Publishing before all release evidence checks pass

sources.reason: Defines the release task and publication acceptance.
Defines exact-SHA release and evidence requirements.
Defines public distribution and candidate checks.

riskAssessment.reason: Publication is externally visible; source identity, exact tag, and all release evidence must match before dispatch.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized publication; the workflow remains fail-closed on any missing or mismatched evidence.

preReviewWarnings: Verify candidate metadata, source commit, immutable tag, release assets, and public install smoke bindings.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Release metadata and version metadata declare v0.5.32 consistently, with candidate state based on the current release.
Local release, distribution, supply-chain, installer, and project quality checks pass.
The configured workflow publishes only after exact main SHA, smoke, compatibility, release assets, and tag-target checks pass.
The published tag and release evidence are verified and recorded in the archived Summary.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The merged Trust Layer work needs an immutable, source-bound public release so adopters can consume the verified result.
constraints: Publish only v0.5.32 from the latest green main commit.
Require every configured release gate and exact tag check.
Do not claim publication until the provider confirms the tag and assets.
intent.rationale: A source-bound release closes the implementation loop and gives the final execution-plan cleanup an immutable evidence reference.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Release evidence is bound to exact main source commit
Installer and public distribution smoke succeed

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized publication in the requested uninterrupted execution plan; workflow gates remain mandatory.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
